title: perezia spathulata
intro: Perezia spathulata, also known as the common perezia, is a perennial plant native to South America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, offering several health benefits due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Perezia spathulata is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been used in folk medicine to support overall well-being and combat various health issues.
